purpose: Convert outfit reference images into clean headless and handless female T-pose modular outfit renders that preserve pauldrons, fur liners, belts, sashes, and structured coats when compatible with the locked silhouette.

referenceImages.description: Authoritative female T-pose body, limb length, width, cutoff, and framing template.

front.label: Female Armored Outfit Front
front.description: Front-facing technical modular armored outfit render on the locked female silhouette.

back.label: Female Armored Outfit Back
back.description: Direct rear view continuing the same modular armored outfit from the approved front view.
